lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Brainrot Evolution Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Redeem active promo codes for potions, crates, tickets, and early wins. Keep the expired entries nearby so you do not waste attempts on dead codes.
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Open Brainrot Evolution, tap the Shop button on the left, open the Codes tab on the right, paste a code, and press Verify. Codes are one-time use per account and are usually refreshed during updates, events, and milestone drops.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Brainrot Evolution Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.subtitle: This route shows what to farm first, when to spend wins, and how pets, relics, dungeons, and rebirth fit together. It is built for faster early progression without wasting resources on the wrong map.
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Brainrot Evolution is built around eating to gain levels, unlocking new evolutions, and using wins to buy stronger support systems. The cleanest early route is to upgrade only enough to clear each area, keep your best pets equipped, and save your biggest win spending for later worlds.

items.title: Learn the core loop
items.body: Your early job is simple: eat to gain levels, unlock new evolutions, and keep wins flowing. More content opens as your level rises, so speed and survival matter more than collecting everything in the first area.
tips: Levels unlock new evolutions and more game systems.
Wins are used to open zones, eggs, and machines.
Saturday updates regularly add fresh content.

items.title: Buy only a few early eggs in Tung Tung Park
items.body: The first three eggs cost 10, 45, and 250 Wins, so they are perfect for a quick early power spike. A few useful starter pulls are Dog (+1), Cat (+1.25), Bat (+1.5), and Baby Dragon (+2), but the goal is to get stronger fast and move on, not overspend in the starter map.
tips: Egg 1 costs 10 Wins.
Egg 2 costs 45 Wins.
Egg 3 costs 250 Wins.

items.title: Equip your best pets and keep advancing
items.body: Pets are your main early damage multiplier, and you can equip three by default. Open just enough eggs in each map to beat the local boss comfortably, then shift to the next area instead of dumping all your wins into one zone.
tips: Use your strongest three pets at all times.
Replace older pets as soon as a new map gives cleaner upgrades.
Move on once boss fights stop feeling risky.

items.title: Power-level solo or in a duo
items.body: Large parties split EXP, so solo play or a small duo is the cleanest way to level fast. Team up only when you need help clearing hard sections or bosses that slow your run down.
tips: Solo runs are usually the fastest EXP route.
A duo is still manageable when you need support.
Avoid big groups if raw leveling speed is your priority.

items.title: Farm passive enemies first, then add bosses
items.body: Passive enemies are the safest early farm because they do not fight back. Once your damage is stable and your pets are upgraded, rotate in boss kills for bigger EXP bursts and smoother area clears.
tips: Passives are safer for steady farming.
Bosses are better once survival is no longer a problem.
Use safer targets to build momentum before pushing hard fights.

items.title: Use dungeons as your first big catch-up tool
items.body: Dungeons become a major spike source once you reach Larila Desert and unlock Gorillo Watermellondrillo. Even one clear is useful early, and later dungeon runs become a reliable way to farm stronger relics.
tips: Run at least one dungeon when you unlock the system.
Early dungeon clears boost both EXP and gear quality.
Later on, dungeons become a strong relic farm.

items.title: Match relics to the job you are doing
items.body: Relics come from crates, weather events, bosses, raids, and stations. Use EXP relics while leveling, then swap to wins or damage-focused relics when you are pushing zones; good early examples include Bronze Belt (+10% Damage), Bronze Cape (+10% Damage and +5% EXP), and Silver Belt (+5% Damage and +15% EXP).
tips: EXP relics are best while climbing levels.
Damage relics help stabilize boss clears.
Higher crates usually mean stronger relic pools.

items.title: Take your first rebirth as soon as the cycle is done
items.body: Your first rebirth opens after you escape Tung Tung Park and reach level 11. Rebirth gives permanent strength progression and new features; your level and unlocked evolutions reset, but wins, relics, and gems stay with you, so the next climb is much faster.
tips: First rebirth unlock point: level 11 after leaving the starter area.
Rebirth is the long-term progression engine.
Do not sit too long in the first cycle once you meet the requirement.

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Brainrot Evolution Rebirth Guide
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.subtitle: Learn what rebirth changes, what to prep before resetting, and which level milestones mark each rebirth jump.
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Rebirth is one of the biggest account-speed systems in Brainrot Evolution. Use this guide to line up each rebirth checkpoint, keep the parts of your run that matter, and rebuild faster after every reset.

items.title: Know what rebirth changes
items.description: Rebirth boosts future progress and resets your level. The rebirth reference notes that Secrets stay with you, while the inventory guide treats rebirth as the main reset point for inventory management.
bullets: Rebirth boosts stats and resets level.
Secrets stay with you after rebirthing.
Check pets, brainrots, and relics before you reset.

items.title: Use the main rebirth checkpoints
items.description: The progression ladder marks each major rebirth jump with a named Brainrot. These are the cleanest breakpoints to plan around.

items.title: Prep your fastest rebuild loadout
items.description: Before each reset, line up the tools that make the next climb shorter. The official-style wiki tips repeatedly point back to XP farming, relic management, and better crates.
bullets: Farm your highest unlocked zone for faster XP.
Fuse relics and smelt extras before you reset.

items.title: Plan around rebirth-linked unlocks
items.description: A few systems and updates are tied directly to rebirth progress, so these make strong stopping points instead of overgrinding one map.
bullets: Wins unlock new zones and machines.
Trading opens after your second Rebirth.
Cadabra Restaurant introduced the Rebirth 7 line through Bombardini Tortini.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Brainrot Evolution All Brainrots
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.subtitle: Browse the full main progression lineup from Patapim Park to Brainheaven. Every row includes the world, level, health, damage, and a quick tag for bosses, OG units, or rebirth checkpoints.
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Use this index when you need to find a specific Brainrot fast. The list follows the live world order and keeps the mainline ladder in one place, so you can jump from early-game names like Tralalero Tralala to late-game entries like Squallo Cavallo without opening multiple pages.

items.brainrot: Dar Dir Durr Dorr Telur Dadar

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Brainrot Evolution Trading Values
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.subtitle: These are the highest-listed current values on the main trading sheet. Compare both sides before you lock a deal.
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: The current value sheet is led by Tri Ton at 3.5M, with Secret Meowl at 2.6M and Evilduck at 2.4M. The official calculator uses W/F/L to label whether a trade result is good, balanced, or bad, so the fastest check is to compare the total listed value on your side against the total listed value on the other side before you confirm.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Brainrot Evolution Secrets Guide
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.subtitle: Secrets come from crate drops, fusion recipes, event passes, and exclusive packs. This table highlights the routes with the clearest payoffs and the strongest stat bumps.
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Every unlocked Secret adds a 10% Secret Boost to your current stats, so chasing the right ones matters even before you min-max trades. The standouts below cover late-game fusion crafts, premium and event pass rewards, dungeon crate drops, and high-end exclusive pack pulls.

items.unlock_route: Fuse Job Job Job Sahur, Gargirgurgargargar, and Tic Tac Sahur
Fuse Papayaneli Owlicina, Strawberrini Octosini, and Nightmare YONI in World 14
Fuse Pinkberri Cuoricini, Pigu Amore, Cuoricino Amorso, and Cuore Dannato (10% chance)
Defeat the Pulu Pulu Pulu Pulpen boss when the weather spawns
Fuse Bluberrini Octossini, Tarari Tarara, and Gargirgurgargargar in World 8
Fuse Cactus Formaggio, YONI PONI, Quesadilla Crocodila, and Plorbo Lemozzadrilo (10% chance)
Complete the premium Patrick Event pass
Craft Los Stantanitos Tralaleritos, Snowmanito Bandito, Ginger Ginger Ginger Sahur, and Giftinini Mananini
Fuse Blueberinni Octossini, Strawberri Octossini, and Blueberrini Tatticini
Reach level 10 in the Valentine Event F2P pass
Open Vault crates by completing the Vault of Jupiter dungeon
Open Crocodillitos crates during the Los Crocodillitos weather event

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Brainrot Evolution Secret Tier List
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.subtitle: This grid weights current trade value at the top end, then raw buff strength and unlock difficulty. It is built for the late-game question players ask most: which Secrets are worth protecting, crafting, or flipping?
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Tri Ton Ton Sahur and Secret Meowl sit at the top for different reasons: Tri Ton Ton Sahur combines a 375% boost with a 770K listed value, while Secret Meowl leads the current secret market at 2.6M. Right below them, the best fusion and pass Secrets stay relevant because they compress massive power into fewer roster slots.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Brainrot Evolution Pets Guide
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.subtitle: Pets scale grinding speed across every world, so the smartest route is not hatching everything equally. Use this table to spot the best pet in each key egg and decide when the next price jump is worth it.
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: The cleanest breakpoints come when the top pet in an egg meaningfully outpaces the last one you were farming. Early examples are Baby Dragon at 2 Damage and Squirrel at 4, but the larger spikes arrive at Ancient Egg (22), Scorpio Egg (62), Kraken Egg (205), Marsh Egg (475), Monster Egg (745), Xenon Egg (1.05k), and Sahure Egg (2.5k).

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Brainrot Evolution Items Guide
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: These Brainrot Evolution item FAQs focus on when to use potions, tickets, scrolls, and event consumables for maximum value.

faqs.question: Which Brainrot Evolution potion should I use first?
faqs.answer: Use EXP-focused potions during level pushes, then swap to wins-focused consumables when unlock costs become the bottleneck.

faqs.question: When should I spend Brainrot Evolution event tickets?
faqs.answer: Spend tickets during active event windows when limited crates or boss tables include high-demand units.

faqs.question: How do Brainrot Evolution scrolls fit into progression?
faqs.answer: Use scrolls on higher-value relic targets instead of early filler upgrades to avoid wasting rare enhancement resources.

faqs.question: Should I save Brainrot Evolution consumables before rebirth?
faqs.answer: Yes. Keep your best consumables for the first stretch after rebirth to rebuild speed quickly.

faqs.question: What is the safest Brainrot Evolution item routine each session?
faqs.answer: Start with EXP tools, switch to damage or wins based on your bottleneck, and save premium consumables for boss-heavy windows.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Brainrot Evolution Trading Guide
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Use this Brainrot Evolution Trading Guide to unlock trading cleanly, evaluate offers, and reduce risky swaps.

faqs.question: When does Brainrot Evolution trading unlock?
faqs.answer: Trading is tied to progression milestones. Confirm your current rebirth and world prerequisites before opening trade sessions.

faqs.question: How do I check if a Brainrot Evolution trade is fair?
faqs.answer: Compare both value range and demand trend, then re-check after every offer change before confirming.

faqs.question: Which Brainrot Evolution assets are easiest to overpay for?
faqs.answer: New event units and short-supply secrets often spike first. Wait for stabilized comparisons when possible.

faqs.question: How can I avoid Brainrot Evolution trade scams?
faqs.answer: Verify exact unit names and variants, record screenshots, and never confirm while details are changing quickly.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Brainrot Evolution Boss Event Guide
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Follow this Brainrot Evolution Boss Event Guide to time entries, prepare loadouts, and convert limited windows into stronger rewards.

steps.title: Track Event Windows Early
steps.description: Check update announcements and community alerts before the event starts so your route is ready at spawn time.

steps.title: Prepare Boss-Focused Loadout

faq.title: Brainrot Evolution
faq.subtitle: Everything players ask about Brainrot Evolution codes, progression pacing, trading safety, and weekly updates.

questions.question: How often does Brainrot Evolution receive updates?
questions.answer: Brainrot Evolution commonly updates on Saturday, and update notes usually affect codes, world pacing, and event planning.

questions.question: What is the fastest Brainrot Evolution early progression route?
questions.answer: In Brainrot Evolution, focus on efficient world transitions, upgrade only needed pets, and line up your first rebirth quickly.

questions.question: How should I redeem Brainrot Evolution codes correctly?
questions.answer: Open Brainrot Evolution, use the in-game Codes tab, paste the code exactly, and redeem each code once per account.

questions.question: When should I start Brainrot Evolution trading?
questions.answer: Start Brainrot Evolution trading after you unlock required progression milestones and can evaluate value plus demand together.

questions.question: Which Brainrot Evolution modules should I read first?
questions.answer: For Brainrot Evolution, start with Codes, Beginner Guide, Rebirth Guide, and All Brainrots, then move to trading and event modules.

questions.question: Where can I follow official Brainrot Evolution community links?
questions.answer: Use the Brainrot Evolution Discord, Roblox Group, X account, and YouTube channel listed on this homepage footer.
